title: Harness outcome-telemetry v2 event
description: One line of .harness/var/log.jsonl carrying an explicit version: 2. The prose contract lives in the outcome-telemetry standard doc; this schema restates it as a machine contract. v1 records (exactly ts/hook/event/file/detail, no version key) are a separate shape and are NOT instances of this schema.

ts.description: UTC timestamp, ISO 8601 with Z suffix

context.description: Optional, explicitly sourced attribution; {} is valid and means unknown. Consumers ignore unknown nested fields.

provenance.description: Maps every present attribution field to its source; absent when context is empty

data.description: Event-specific payload; e.g. gate events carry name/mode/outcome/exit_code/duration_s
